creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am not able to reproduce this problem on 13-STABLE either.

Can people provide the following information:

1. uname -a (does this affect 13-RELEASE-p11 only or other 13-STABLE?)
2. Whether their O/S is updated using buildworld/installworld or binary updates.
3. Whether the port was installed using pkg install/upgrade or using make install.
4. If building/installing using make install, what are the contents of make.conf?
5. If building/installing using make install, what options were used? You can find those in /var/db/ports,
6. Send me a copy of any screen.core file.
7. Are there any messages in /var/log/messages pertaining to segfaults, bus 
faults, abort() faults, etc.?
8. And also pkg info -aI output, please.


Also, if built using a local poudriere, please provide a copy of /var/db/ports for the jail. You should be able to find that in $POUDRIERE_ETC/poudriere.d/. ($POUDRIERE_ETC defaults to /usr/local/etc.)

Without this information we are left guessing.
